description_long: This is a classical-style marble sculpture depicting a headless male nude figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure's left arm is bent and resting on an object, while the right arm hangs down, holding a draped cloth or possibly a lion's pelt. At the figure's right leg, a smaller, partially draped secondary figure or decorative element is integrated into the support structure. The musculature and anatomical details are finely rendered, with smooth, polished surfaces and subtle shadowing. The back view reveals strong shoulder blades and a well-defined back, with the support structure continuing up the right side. The entire sculpture is rendered in a white, slightly glossy material, likely intended to resemble marble.
description: A headless, classical male nude sculpture in white marble, standing on a rectangular base with a draped support and secondary figure at the right leg. The surface is smooth and polished, with detailed anatomical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headless male torso, left arm bent, right arm holding a draped object, and a secondary figure at the right leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bent left arm, the muscular torso, and the draped support structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back musculature, both arms, and the continuation of the support structure up the right side.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the right arm, the draped object, and the secondary figure integrated into the support.
attribute_subject_matter: classical male nude figure with draped support and secondary figure
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
